title: Comprehensive Statistical Analysis of Synthetic End-to-End Results (5 Methods × 6 Variants × 5 Folds)
summary: Demo notebook for comprehensive statistical analysis of 5 methods x 6 variants x 5 folds from a balance-guided oblique decision tree experiment. Loads pre-computed evaluation results and demonstrates eight analyses: Friedman+Nemenyi ranking, XOR significance testing, module-accuracy correlation, Pareto frontier analysis, no-structure control, high-dimensional diagnosis, signed vs unsigned spectral effect sizes (Hedges' g), and success criteria assessment. Includes statistical helper functions (Cohen's d, Hedges' g, bootstrap CIs, Wilcoxon tests) and a four-panel visualization. Uses curated mini dataset (18 examples across 6 variants) with N_BOOTSTRAP=10000 (full original value).
